title: SSC Xu Addon
description: a SSC(Shape Shifter Curse) addon add some extra form and few extra item
body:
# SSC Xu Addon
An expansion mod for SSC(Shape Shifter Curse)  
[CurseForge Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ssc-xu-addon)

---

## New Extra Form:

![FamiliarFoxPurify Form Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa16ba47665badaa732b1f9f6832d4c10782d376.png)
**Familiar Fox Purify** *(in familiar fox feral form eat unstable holy apple in the cursed moon night)*

![BatFormImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79583ba40e8b5a9e13dda9065ef44d7afdbaf2a4_0.webp)
**Bat Vampire** *(in bat feral form use blood gem)*

![CatVFFormImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/551251339f4611079a5d90aba4dc13ba34a637cc_0.webp)
**Cat Village Friend** *(in feral cat form use emerald essence)*

![AllaySEFormImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c67f4bf659571550ce8cc1324085077672a428d_0.webp)
**Allay Spatial Engineer** *(in allay form use space gem)*

![OcelotFormImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85b57a5c6aa5392b15f25b61620575a8e259ec42.png)
**Ocelot Jungle Assassin** *(in ocelot feral form use wind gem)*

![AxolotlFormImage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/240d417dded8d885c870ab1ad14e7a65ab559e9f.png)
**Axolotl Sea King** *(in axolotl feral form use water gem)*

---

## New Skills
![FireBall EX Spell Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/978426a28a24ad1bcee1ff50c67b8fbf1263947c_0.webp)
**Fire Ball (minecraft:stick) / Fire Ball EX (shape-shifter-curse:fire_charm_paper)** *(use special item and cost few / huge Mana to cast spell, deal few / huge damage to target, the charm paper version will create a explosion without break block)*

![Fire Arrow Spell Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9aba50aff0f7f772b2f15865442f0b840a4366cc_0.webp)
**Fire Arrow (minecraft:arrow)** *(use special item and cost medium mana to cast spell, deal huge damage to single target)*

![FireRing Spell Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2694d86201d1b29010f72a84981dbd9a5080a1_0.webp)
**Fire Ring (Active Key 1)** *(press Active Key 1 and cost very huge mana to cast, it will deal moderate damage to nearby entities and knock them back)*

![BloodThorn](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/349ef5a8945ae406e8a7217f3c464f679a9965cc_0.webp)
**Blood Thorn (Active Key 1)** *(press Active Key 1 and cost few blood resource to cast, it will shoot 5 blood thorn to target, When it hits a target, it restores a little amount of health and Blood Resource.)*

**Blood Step (Active Key 2)** *(press Active Key 2 and cost few blood resource to cast, it will teleport you to the targeted location, grant you Invisibility, and cause nearby enemies to lose aggro.)*

---

## 1 mechanics
**Mana Level** (0/ExhaustionMode(0%-20%), 1(0%-100%), 2(50%-100%), 3(75%-100%)) you can toggle (Use Active Key 2) the mana level to save mana or increase mana damage, the higher the mana level, the stronger the magic effect.

When your mana points reach zero you will enter the ExhaustionMode it will disable your magical skills until you recover to 20% of your maximum mana

When your mana below the mana level require mana percent you will enter the lower mana level (example level3(75%-100%) max mana is 500, when your mana below 500x75%=375 mana, you will enter the level 2 mana level)


---

## Various unique powers
see the Book of ShapeShifter(shape-shifter-curse:book_of_shape_shifter) Page

---

## 2 extra food
**Unstable Holy Golden Apple:** Familiar Fox Purify Morphing items, Extra use: eating it will revert your form to original shifter form (5%) or create a huge explosion without break block (95%)

**Stable Holy Golden Apple:** eating it will revert your form to original shifter form (100%)

## New Items
**Blood Gem:** Can be found in Nether Fortresses and Ruined Portals. when use it other form will cost 40% hp to grant buff(15s), bat vampire form will add 50% blood resource

**Emerald Essence:** Cat Village Friend Morphing item, other form can break it to obtain recycled emeralds

**Space Gem**: Allay Spatial Engineer Morphing item, it can open a storage space(20%) ender chest storage(10%) end city loot(20%) 10 void damage(50%)

**Stable Space Gem**: It can stably open a storage space, When using sneak mode, open the ender chest storage

**Space Bag**: 9 Slot storage item

**Wind Gem** Ocelot Jungle Assassin Morphing item, when use it other form will gain 5min Speed Jump Boost and Haste Buff

**Water Gem** Axolotl Sea King Morphing item, when use it other form will gain water breathing fire resistance regeneration for 10 min

## 2 extra weapon
**Blood Long Claw** Bat Vampire Form Weapon, When hit entity it will store blood to create **Blood Gem**

**Sea King Scepter** Axolotl Sea King Weapon, Use Skill 2 to charge. When overcharged, you can hold right-click to summon a virtual water trident, dealing medium-area magic damage at the target location.

## 2 extra enchantment

**Shapeshifter Killer** Deals extra damage to shapeshifters.

**Shapeshifter Protection** Reduces damage taken from shapeshifters.

---
#### If you have any issues, please raise them on [Github](https://github.com/xu233333/SSC_Xu_Addon).
